cases.input: Start this session in a clean repo and identify the first safe action.
cases.expected_behavior: Verify repo, branch, clean status, context sources, guardrails, and first action.

cases.input: Bootstrap the session, but git status shows unrelated local changes.
cases.expected_behavior: Block writes, list changed paths, and require scope resolution.

cases.input: Start the next skill while an earlier PR is still open.
cases.expected_behavior: Pause because the workflow permits only one open PR at a time.

cases.input: Repo instructions conflict with a newer explicit user rule.
cases.expected_behavior: Apply source precedence, preserve both claims, and mark the conflict.

cases.input: Resume work but no prior handoff packet is available.
cases.expected_behavior: Start from repo instructions, mark handoff missing, and include lookup as first action.
Do not activate unless the request asks to start or resume a guarded session.

cases.input: Load everything in user-context before starting.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject bulk loading and read only indexed task-relevant context.

cases.input: Validate a JSON bootstrap packet fixture offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid packets and reject missing environment, dirty-pass, and missing first-action packets.
